trigger.description: An existing procedural rule already covers the remember-time evidence cluster, so a duplicate proposal is not created.
setup_commands: ee remember 'Cargo release rule 0: run cargo fmt --check before release.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --tags cargo,release --json
ee remember 'Cargo release rule 1: run cargo fmt --check before release.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --tags cargo,release --json
ee rule add 'Run cargo fmt --check before release work.' --workspace . --tag cargo --tag release --source-memory <first-memory-id> --source-memory <second-memory-id> --json
trigger.invocation: ee remember 'Cargo release rule 2: run cargo fmt --check before release.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --tags cargo,release --json
